source_notes: Generated based on Cambridge English Vocabulary Profile (EVP), Oxford 3000/5000, OPAL Academic Phrase Bank, and PHRASE list reference knowledge. No proprietary dataset copied verbatim. CEFR tags assigned conservatively (lower when uncertain).
